expected_behavior: Timeout/retry limits are bounded, idempotency is tenant-scoped, and duplicate real/mock side effects are prevented or explicitly compensated.
given: An allowed external operation times out, returns retryable failure, or receives duplicate execution requests.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Attempt timeline, one side effect maximum, idempotency key scope, compensation/audit record.
then: Timeout/retry limits are bounded, idempotency is tenant-scoped, and duplicate real/mock side effects are prevented or explicitly compensated.
verification_method: Mock provider fault and duplicate-request tests.
